stages.concept:
# Unit 083: 접속사 (결과/목적) so ~ that ~, so that ~ - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 결과와 목적을 나타내는 접속사 **so ~ that ~**과 **so that ~**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **so + 형용사/부사 + that ~** — 너무 ~해서 …하다 (결과)

> He was **so** tired **that** he fell asleep immediately.
> 그는 너무 피곤해서 즉시 잠이 들었다.

> She spoke **so** fast **that** I couldn't understand her.
> 그녀는 너무 빨리 말해서 나는 그녀를 이해할 수 없었다.

> The movie was **so** boring **that** I fell asleep.
> 그 영화는 너무 지루해서 나는 잠이 들었다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 알맞은 해석을 고르세요.**
"The box was so heavy that I couldn't lift it."
1. 그 상자는 무겁기 때문에 내가 들 수 없었다.
2. 그 상자는 너무 무거워서 내가 들 수 없었다. ✅
3. 내가 상자를 들 수 없도록 무겁게 했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **so that + 주어 + can/will/may ~** — ~하기 위해서, ~하도록 (목적)

> I studied hard **so that** I **could** pass the exam.
> 나는 시험에 통과할 수 있도록 열심히 공부했다.

> She left early **so that** she **could** catch the train.
> 그녀는 기차를 타기 위해 일찍 떠났다.

> Speak louder **so that** everyone **can** hear you.
> 모든 사람이 들을 수 있도록 더 크게 말해라.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 떨어져 있는 'so ~ that'은 결과(너무 ~해서), 붙어있는 'so that'은 목적(~하기 위해)! 구별해야겠어요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 083: 접속사(결과목적) so~that~, so that~ - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She went to the gym (     ) she could stay healthy.
> **정답** so that

---

**02.** He was ? tired that he fell asleep in class.
> **정답** so

---

**03.** I studied hard ? I could pass the exam.
> **정답** so that

---

**04.** The movie was ? scary that I couldn't watch it.
> **정답** so

---

**05.** She spoke loudly ? everyone could hear her.
> **정답** so that

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He was so hungry so he ate three bowls of rice.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so → that

---

**07.** She is so smart so she can solve any problem.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so (두 번째) → that

---

**08.** I saved money so what I could buy a new bike.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so what → so that

---

**09.** The soup was so that hot I burned my tongue.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so that hot → so hot that

---

**10.** He ran fast so as that he could catch the bus.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** so as that → so that

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 너무 바빠서 나를 만날 수 없었다.
She was busy she couldn't meet me.
> **정답** so, that

---

**12.** 나는 시험에 합격하기 위해 열심히 공부했다.
I studied hard I could pass the exam.
> **정답** so that

---

**13.** 그 문제는 너무 어려워서 아무도 풀 수 없었다.
The problem was difficult nobody could solve it.
> **정답** so, that

---

**14.** 그는 건강을 유지하기 위해 매일 운동한다.
He exercises every day he can stay healthy.
> **정답** so that

---

**15.** 날씨가 너무 추워서 밖에 나갈 수 없었다.
It was cold we couldn't go outside.
> **정답** so, that

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그는 너무 피곤해서 잠이 들었다.
was He so tired that he fell asleep
> **정답** He / was / so / tired / that / he / fell / asleep

---

**17.** 나는 그녀를 볼 수 있도록 앞으로 갔다.
went I forward so that I could see her
> **정답** I / went / forward / so / that / I / could / see / her

---

**18.** 영화가 너무 재미있어서 두 번 봤다.
The movie was so fun that I watched it twice
> **정답** The / movie / was / so / fun / that / I / watched / it / twice

---

**19.** 그녀는 비를 맞지 않기 위해 우산을 가져갔다.
She took an umbrella so that she wouldn't get wet
> **정답** She / took / an / umbrella / so / that / she / wouldn't / get / wet

---

**20.** 음악 소리가 너무 커서 이웃이 불평했다.
The music was so loud that the neighbors complained
> **정답** The / music / was / so / loud / that / the / neighbors / complained
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 083: 접속사(결과목적) so~that~, so that~ - 연습문제 B

**01.** 빈칸에 이어질 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
그 책은 너무 지루해서 나는 잠이 들었다.
The book was _______ boring _______ I fell asleep.
so - and
so - but
too - to
so - that
> **정답** so - that

---

**02.** 빈칸에 이어질 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
그들은 바닥을 닦기 위해 물건들을 치웁니다.
They put things away _______ _______ they can mop
the floor.
so - and
such - that
so - that
so - but
> **정답** so - that

---

**03.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Why doesn't she buy it?
그녀는 왜 그것을 사지 않나요?
B: It is _________ expensive that she can't buy it.
- 너무 비싸서 그녀는 그것을 살 수 없어요.
too
very
such
so
> **정답** so

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오.
Amy was so hungry that she ate all the food.
Though Amy was so hungry, she ate all the
food.
While Amy was so hungry, she ate all the
food.
Because Amy was so hungry, she ate all the
food.
Amy was so hungry, but she didn't eat all the
food.
> **정답** Because Amy was so hungry, she ate all the food.

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
He is so young that he can't drive.
He is young, but he can drive.
He is young, and he can drive.
He can't drive because he is so young.
He is too young to drive.
> **정답** He can't drive because he is so young., He is too young to drive.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I exercise hard so that I lose weight.
I exercise hard when I lose weight.
I exercised hard so as to lose weight.
I exercise hard in order to lose weight.
I exercise hard because I lose weight.
> **정답** I exercise hard in order to lose weight., I exercised hard so as to lose weight.

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I woke up early so that I wouldn't be late.
I woke up early since I was late.
I woke up early when I was late.
I woke up early not to be late.
I woke up early in order not to be late.
> **정답** I woke up early not to be late., I woke up early in order not to be late.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
He is so rich that he can buy the building.
His eyes were too bad that he couldn't read
the sign.
They ran so fast that they were out of breath.
The amusement park was enough crowded
that I missed my friend.
> **정답** The amusement park was enough crowded that I missed my friend.
> **정답His eyes were too bad that he couldn't read the sign.

---

**09.** 주어진 두 문장을 한 문장으로 알맞게 연결한 것을
고르시오.
The movie was very sad.
She cried a lot.
The movie was so sad that she cried a lot.
The movie was too sad that she cried a lot.
The movie was too sad to cry a lot.
The movie was so sad that she didn't cry a lot.
> **정답** The movie was so sad that she cried a lot.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The speech was _______ long that I was bored.
I did my best _______ that I finished the work.
so
too
very
for
> **정답** so

---

**11.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오.
We did many experiments so that we succeeded in
the project.
We did many experiments and we succeeded
in the project.
We did many experiments until we succeeded
in the project.
We did many experiments because we
succeeded in the project.
We did many experiments in order to succeed
in the project.
> **정답** We did many experiments in order to succeed in the project.

---

**12.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 모두
고르시오. [2개]
He studies English.
He wants to go to America.
He studies English in order to go to America.
He studies English so that he can go to
America.
He studies English but he goes to America.
He studies English, and he goes to America.
> **정답** He studies English so that he can go to America., He studies English in order to go to America.

---

**13.** 빈칸에 이어질 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
The play was _______ fun _______ I watched it three
times.
too - to
too - that
so - that
enough - that
> **정답** so - that

---

**14.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Why don't you drink the tea?
B: The tea is _________ hot that I can't drink it.
enough
too
much
so
> **정답** so

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He recycles garbage such that
he protects the environment.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** such → so

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
It was so cold what we
turned on the stove.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** what → that

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Her article was so wonderful
that she wins an award last
year.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wins → won

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
그는 너무 어려서 혼자 여행할 수 없다.
He is young so that he can't travel alone. .
He is too young to travel alone.
He is so young that he can't travel alone. .
He is too young that he can't travel alone. .
> **정답** He is so young that he can't travel alone., He is too young to travel alone.

---

**19.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
I bought a ticket so that I could go to the concert.
I bought a ticket in order to go to the concert.
I bought a ticket so as to go to the concert.
I bought a ticket and went to the concert.
Because I went to the concert, I bought a
ticket.
> **정답** I bought a ticket so as to go to the concert., I bought a ticket in order to go to the concert.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He found a pencil so that he could take notes.
They reached out in that they shook hands.
I was too angry that I couldn't speak.
She is so nice that everyone likes her.
> **정답** She is so nice that everyone likes her., He found a pencil so that he could take notes.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 083 접속사(결과목적) so~that~, so that~중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 두 문장을 so~ that을 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
She is weak. She can't lift the box.
She is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 so, weak, that, she, can't, lift, the, box

---

**02.** 주어진 두 문장을 so~ that을 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
He was so bored. He turned on TV.
He was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 so, bored, that, he, turned, on, TV

---

**03.** 주어진 두 문장을 so that을 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
He took a shower. He could go outside.
He took a shower  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 so, that, he, could, go, outside

---

**04.** 주어진 두 문장을 so that을 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
He turned off the light. He could fall asleep.
He turned off the light  (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 so, that, he, could, fall, asleep

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 가족을 부양하기 위해서 열심히 일했다.
힌트 (     ) support her family
She worked hard  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 so, that, she, could (would), support, her, family

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 약은 너무 써서 그녀는 얼굴을 찡그렸다.
힌트 (     ) bitter, frown
The medicine was  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 so, bitter, that, she, frowned

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우주는 너무 넓어서 우리는 모든 것을 알 수 없다.
힌트 (     ) wide, can't
The universe is  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 know everything.
정답 so, wide, that, we, can't (cannot, can not)

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 오두막을 짓기 위해서 나무를 베었다.
힌트 (     ) that, could, build, he, so, a, cabin
He cut down a tree  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 so, that, he, could, build, a, cabin

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 소설은 너무 새로워서 우리는 그것을 이해할 수 없었다.
힌트 (     ) new, we, that, couldn't, so, understand,
it
The novel was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 so, new, that, we, couldn't, understand, it

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그녀는 유명해지기 위해서 동영상을 만들었다.
힌트 (     ) that, she, famous, so, could, become
She made a video  (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 so, that, she, could, become, famous

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 083: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 빈칸에 이어질 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
그 영화는 너무 지루해서 나는 잠이 들었다.
The movie was _______ boring _______ I fell asleep. so - and so - but too - to so - that
> 정답: so - that

---

**02.** 빈칸에 이어질 말이 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
그들은 바닥을 쓸기 위해 물건들을 치웁니다.
They put things away _______ _______ they can sweep the floor.
so - and such - that so - that so - but
> 정답: so - that

---

**03.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: Why doesn't he buy it? 그는 왜 그것을 사지 않나요?
B: It is _________ expensive that he can't buy it. - 너무 비싸서 그는 그것을 살 수 없어요. too very such so
> 정답: so

---

**04.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오.
Tom was so hungry that he ate all the pizza.
Though Tom was so hungry, he ate all the pizza.
While Tom was so hungry, he ate all the pizza.
Because Tom was so hungry, he ate all the pizza.
Tom was so hungry, but he didn't eat all the pizza.
> 정답: Because Tom was so hungry, he ate all the pizza.

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
She is so young that she can't drive.
She is young, but she can drive.
She is young, and she can drive.
She can't drive because she is so young.
She is too young to drive.
> 정답: She can't drive because she is so young., She is too young to drive.

---

**06.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I exercise hard so that I stay healthy.
I exercise hard when I stay healthy.
I exercised hard so as to stay healthy.
I exercise hard in order to stay healthy.
I exercise hard because I stay healthy.
> 정답: I exercise hard in order to stay healthy., I exercised

---

**07.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) I woke up early so that I wouldn't miss the bus.
I woke up early since I missed the bus.
I woke up early when I missed the bus.
I woke up early not to miss the bus.
I woke up early in order not to miss the bus.
> 정답: I woke up early not to miss the bus., I woke up early in not to be late.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 문장을 고르시오. [2개]
He is so rich that he can buy the building.
His eyes were too bad that he couldn't read the notice.
They ran so fast that they were out of breath.
The stadium was enough crowded that I lost my friend.
> 정답: The stadium was enough crowded that I

---

**09.** 주어진 두 문장을 한 문장으로 알맞게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
The story was very sad.
She cried a lot.
The story was so sad that she cried a lot.
The story was too sad that she cried a lot.
The story was too sad to cry a lot.
The story was so sad that she didn't cry a lot.
> 정답: The story was so sad that she cried a lot.

---

**10.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
The lecture was _______ long that I was bored.
I did my best _______ that I completed the task. so too very for
> 정답: so

---

**11.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 비슷한 문장을 고르시오.
We did many tests so that we succeeded in the research.
We did many tests and we succeeded in the research.
We did many tests until we succeeded in the research.
We did many tests because we succeeded in the research.
We did many tests in order to succeed in the research.
> 정답: We did many tests in order to succeed in the project.

---
